postmark.Subject: Submission package — David Okafor
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Full package for David Okafor (refi) is hosted on WeTransfer — package is ~80MB with scanned NOA, ID, mortgage statement, appraisal, and supporting documents.

Download link: https://wetransfer.com/downloads/3f2a9c8b1d4e5f6789abcdef01234567/abcd1234

Link expires in 7 days.

Property: 52 Winston Churchill Boulevard, Mississauga, ON L5M 4Y1
Loan amount: $390,000 (LTV ~54%)

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
